# HarfBuzzSharp 8.3.0.1
> Ships with [SkiaSharp 3.116.1](../3.116.1.md) · [NuGet](https://www.nuget.org/packages/HarfBuzzSharp/8.3.0.1) · [GitHub Release](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/releases/tag/v3.116.1)
> **API changes** · [HarfBuzzSharp API diff](8.3.0.1/index.md)

## Highlights

HarfBuzzSharp 8.3.0.1 is an internal servicing rebuild with no consumer-facing binding changes.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this release.*

## Platform

- **The Android NDK to r27c and update to 16kb alignment (#3096)** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3098](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3098))
